title: ICSE Result 2026 LIVE: CISCE 10th, 12th results releasing out at cisce.org, direct link here
description: ICSE Result 2026 LIVE: CISCE 10th, 12th results has been declared. The Class 10, 12 results can be checked by appeared candidates on cisce.org. Follow the blog for latest updates on results, direct link and more.
